overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Assassin's Creed Mirage) showing a hooded character walking through a historic Middle Eastern city at night. The character navigates through open plazas, narrow market alleys, and covered passages illuminated by warm lanterns against a deep blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central archway monument

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the large illuminated archway ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green tunic walking parallel to ego on the right side

entered.detail: large illuminated stone archway with intricate carvings serving as the focal point ahead
tall palm tree with dense foliage visible against the night sky
multi-story historic stone building with wooden balconies and lattice windows
wooden market stall with goods displayed on tables
tall post with hanging lantern providing warm orange illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide open plaza at night with a clear view of the starry sky. The character walks toward a prominent illuminated archway in the distance, passing palm trees and stone buildings with warm lantern light. Moderate crowds of NPCs walk in various directions across the paved stone ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered archway passage transitioning to narrow alley

events.description: character passes through the large stone archway into a narrower enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: passing through the archway entrance into the narrower streets beyond

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking directly ahead through the archway

entered.detail: the interior passage of the stone archway with carved columns
blue fabric canopy stretched between buildings covering the alley ahead
market stall with wooden frame and displayed textiles

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the grand archway into a more enclosed space where the sky becomes partially obscured. The environment transitions to a narrower alley with fabric awnings overhead and market stalls lining the sides. Warm artificial lighting from hanging lanterns replaces the open moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with overhead awnings and stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow market alley passing between stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown cloak walking toward camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: large terracotta pots with flowering plants placed beside a doorway
arched wooden doorway with intricate carvings and blue decorative tiles

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a densely packed market alley where fabric awnings block most of the sky. The passage is lined with wooden market stalls, potted plants, and doorways with blue decorative tiles. Warm lantern light creates intimate pools of illumination on the stone pavement as pedestrians pass in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passageways and interior rooms transitioning between spaces

events.description: entering darker covered passage with reduced ambient light, relying on wall lanterns
passing through a wooden doorway into an interior room with lattice screens

agents.ego_description: moving through covered walkways and doorways, transitioning between exterior and interior spaces

entered.detail: roofed walkway with wooden beams and hanging decorations
decorative wooden lattice screen with geometric patterns
dimly lit room visible through doorway with carpets and cushions
stone staircase leading upward visible at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the character moves through covered passages with wooden lattice screens. The lighting shifts to dimmer artificial sources as the character passes through doorways into interior spaces with carpets and cushions, then emerges toward a visible staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading to elevated building entrance

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the large building ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the illuminated building entrance at the top

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward between walls
imposing stone building with large arched entrance and decorative facade
wall-mounted lantern casting warm light on the stairway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered passages onto a stone stairway ascending toward a large historic building. The sky becomes fully visible again against the deep blue night. The character climbs the worn stone steps, passing wall-mounted lanterns, approaching the illuminated arched entrance of the building ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, starry plaza into the claustrophobic depths of a night market before ascending toward a historic building. It begins in an open square under a clear night sky, moving past palm trees and crowds toward a grand illuminated archway. As the character passes through the arch, the environment shifts into a narrower alley where fabric awnings and hanging lanterns replace the moonlight, gradually becoming more enclosed among wooden stalls and blue decorative tiles. The scene then transitions into darker, covered passages with wooden lattice screens and interior spaces filled with carpets, before the camera turns toward a visible exit. Finally, the character emerges from the shadows onto a worn stone stairway, climbing upward as the deep blue sky opens up once more toward a brightly lit arched entrance.
